case_number: misconceived as the impugned action is not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3607 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.20165/2024 2. For hearing of CMA No.15876/2024 3. For hearing of main case 18.04.2025 Mir Ashfaque Hussain Talpur, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Learned Assistant Advocate General submits that the apprehension of the petitioner is misconceived as the impugned action is not being taken by the department at the present time. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
